COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $150.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF SPASEFF, KIRK
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,984.80 ACCRUED INTEREST, $485.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF SPASEFF, KIRK
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON OEX FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPASEFF, KIRK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEJADA, HUGO $4,333.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,428.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $48.53 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT TEJADA, HUGO
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION HEARING. NO APPEARANCE BY PARTIES. OFF CALENDAR. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $45 SERVED DEC-21-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TEJADA, HUGO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2015 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPASEFF, KIRK AS TO DEFENDANT TEJADA, HUGO

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2019 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-02-2020 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT CREDITOR KIRK SPASEFF IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR HUGO TEJADA IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT CREDITOR REVIEWS JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S STATEMENT OF ASSETS(SC-133). JUDGE TAKES THE BENCH AND QUESTIONS THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR RE: INCOMPLETE INFORMATION LISTED ON SC-133. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OUTSIDE OF THE COURTROOM AND SET UP A PAYMENT PLAN. JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR $300.00 ON AUGUST 12, 2019 AND THEN MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $552.00 FOR 12 MONTHS. RESOLVE DATE: AUGUST, 2020. MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MARCH 2, 2020. IF NO APPEARANCE THE MATTER WILL BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF KIRK SPANSEFF RE: INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPASEFF, KIRK

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,950.75 ACCRUED INTEREST, $60.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT TEJADA, HUGO
